steps.title: Classify the inserted detail
steps.content: The underlined phrase names Douglas Turner Ward's professional roles as an actor, director, and playwright. It adds background about Ward rather than advancing a new claim about the NEC.

steps.title: Reject overread functions
steps.content: Choice A shifts the focus to the organization. Choice B invents a comparison between two people. Choice C says the phrase argues against an earlier claim, but no opposition is present. The answer is D.
